subject: physics
description: IGCSE Physics 0625. Topics: Motion & energy, Thermal physics, Waves, Electricity & magnetism, Nuclear physics, Space physics.

nodes.name: 运动学
curriculum_points:
3 Define speed as distance travelled per unit time; recall and use the equation
s
v =
t
4 Sketch, plot and interpret distance–time and speed–time graphs

(b) moving with constant speed
(c) accelerating
(d) decelerating
6 Calculate speed from the gradient of a straight-line section of a distance–time graph
